DashboardPage.title: Component health dashboard
DashboardPage.description: Track release readiness, documentation quality and adoption signals for the UI library without leaving the docs app.
DashboardPage.maintenanceDescription: Button, Card and Table are ready for the upcoming docs release. DatePicker still needs accessibility polish before promotion.
DashboardPage.tableDescription: The next release focuses on the components with the highest adoption and the biggest documentation gaps.
DashboardPage.checklistDescription: Keep the launch bar honest while we polish the docs and dark mode coverage.
DashboardPage.checklistDarkMode: Dark mode verified in key surfaces
DashboardPage.ownersDescription: People currently shepherding the release-critical pieces.
DashboardPage.activityDescription: A short feed of the changes that moved the release forward this week.
DashboardPage.activityFeedback: Feedback round completed for the Table empty state.
DashboardPage.activityCoverage: Docs coverage for Modal examples climbed to 100%.
DashboardPage.activityDarkMode: Dark mode overrides shipped for Badge and Alert.
DashboardPage.activityUsage: Two new teams adopted Button and Input this week.
DashboardPage.modalDescription: This release tightens documentation quality and visual consistency before we open the next batch of components.
DashboardPage.modalHighlightsDocs: Documentation examples now cover the most-used component flows.
DashboardPage.modalHighlightsTheme: Dark mode overrides are available for the release-critical dashboard surfaces.
DashboardPage.modalHighlightsTable: Component triage is visible in one place for product, design and engineering.
